system.powerDescription:
You steal the identity of an exorcist or human, literally. The chosen creature is viewed as a stranger by all humans who knew them previously and any attempt to prove their identity will be denied, even if it such denial would be highly illogical. In addition, this power creates a BAUBLE, an accessory that befits the target's personality. Whilst any creature has this bauble displayed on their person they will be recognized/treated as the original target of this power by humans. The BAUBLE breaks if it ever takes any stress, ending this power. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may change the parameters of a roll whilst active.
